task_completion.description: The base image is opened in the image editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GIMP workspace shows a landscape, architectural, or synthetic image loaded on the canvas.

task_completion.description: The active color is set to red.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The foreground color indicator in the tool panel shows a bright red color.

task_completion.description: A red rectangle is created on the image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A solid red rectangular shape is visible on the image canvas.

task_completion.description: The rectangle is in the upper-left area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The red rectangle is located in the top-left quadrant of the image canvas.

task_completion.description: The rectangle is of sufficient size.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The red rectangle is clearly visible and not a tiny dot, appearing to be at least 50x50 pixels.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of the image editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GIMP interface with tool selections, color dialogs, or active selections, rather than terminal commands executing image manipulation.
Screenshots show intermediate steps like selecting the rectangle tool, making a selection, or opening the color dialog, rather than the final image appearing in one step.

integrity.description: The agent did not import a pre-made red rectangle image.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent opening a file browser to import a pre-existing image of a red rectangle.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a bright red rectangle (RGB: 255, 0, 0, or R>=200, G<=100, B<=100) in the upper-left quadrant of the image. The rectangle must be at least 50x50 pixels in size (recommended 100-150 pixels) and have a solid fill (at least 70% fill ratio). The task is performed in GIMP.
